title: Supramolecular Chemistry
author_string: Rodriguez, Maria Eugenia Pérez-Ojeda, Sue, Andrew, Clever, Guido
abstract: Supramolecular chemistry has been explored cross-disciplinary as molecular sensors and machines, nano reactions, drug delivery, chemical catalysis and many more. It was in the spotlight in the past decades and the Nobel Prize was awarded to this research field in 1987.
